rationale: Review 2's sole finding (the implicit instantiation at the algHom_comp_convMul_distrib call in convInv_mul_cancel) correctly identifies a mildly non-obvious inference against the diff, but acting on it yields only a cosmetic explicit-type or comment change in a private helper; this is a trivial clarity nit, not a correctness, robustness or maintainability issue a maintainer would insist on.
